summary: Tested all 8 features. 7/8 pass. TEST 4 (Sign Up form shows email+password locked at top) FAILS due to backend _SIGNUP_FORM_SCHEMA not including email/password. Two bugs fixed during testing: (1) TypeScript compile error in UniversalFormRenderer.tsx, (2) portal_show_stats missing from backend WebsiteSettingsUpdate model (now fixed).

critical.issue: _SIGNUP_FORM_SCHEMA in website.py does not include email/password locked fields at the top (only full_name, company_name, job_title, phone, address). WebsiteSettingsUpdate model was missing portal_show_stats field (FIXED during test). _SIGNUP_FORM_SCHEMA also needs updating and _migrate_signup_schema needs to inject email/password into existing schemas.

action_items: BACKEND FIX NEEDED: Update _SIGNUP_FORM_SCHEMA in /app/backend/routes/admin/website.py to include email (order 0) and password (order 1) as locked fields at the top of the schema. Update _migrate_signup_schema() to inject email+password locked fields into existing saved schemas that don't already have them.

The frontend SIGNUP_DEFAULT_SCHEMA in WebsiteAuthSection.tsx already has email+password correct but is only used when ws.signup_form_schema is empty. Since the backend saves _SIGNUP_FORM_SCHEMA (without email/password) as the default, the frontend default is never used.
critical_code_review_comments: TEST 4 BUG ROOT CAUSE: backend _SIGNUP_FORM_SCHEMA (website.py) starts at full_name (order 0). Frontend SIGNUP_DEFAULT_SCHEMA starts at email (order 0), password (order 1). Backend default takes precedence via DB, so email/password never shown at top for any tenant with an existing saved schema.

portal_show_stats bug was: missing from WebsiteSettingsUpdate Pydantic model - frontend was saving ws including portal_show_stats:false but backend ignored it (Pydantic discards extra fields). FIXED: Added portal_show_stats: Optional[bool] = None to models.py WebsiteSettingsUpdate.

TypeScript error in UniversalFormRenderer.tsx: val declared as string|File caused type errors in address block (JSON.parse) and form input value props. FIXED: cast val as string with (values[key] as string) and address sub-fields with (values.xxx as string).
context_for_next_testing_agent: 7/8 features verified: (1) Form builder number type shows Min/Max value inputs PASS; (2) Form builder date type shows Date format dropdown (YYYY-MM-DD, DD/MM/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, DD-MM-YYYY, MM-DD-YYYY) PASS; (3) Form builder file type shows Max file size (MB) input PASS; (4) Sign Up Page locked fields FAIL - existing DB schema from backend default doesn't have email/password at top, needs backend fix in _SIGNUP_FORM_SCHEMA; (5) Partner Sign-Up tile visible for platform_super_admin PASS; (6) Customer Portal tile opens with Show stats toggle PASS; (7) Portal page hides stats when toggle disabled PASS (needed backend fix in models.py); (8) UniversalFormRenderer file upload renders as styled label+hidden-input+'Choose file' PASS (code verified). Fixes applied this iteration: UniversalFormRenderer.tsx type cast fix, models.py portal_show_stats field added. Admin URL: /admin, Auth & Pages in sidebar. Platform admin login: code=automate-accounts, email=admin@automateaccounts.local, pwd=ChangeMe123!

test_results.test1_number_minmax: PASS - Min value and Max value inputs shown for number type field
test_results.test2_date_format_dropdown: PASS - Date format select shown with 5 options (YYYY-MM-DD, DD/MM/YYYY, MM/DD/YYYY, DD-MM-YYYY, MM-DD-YYYY)
test_results.test3_file_maxsize: PASS - Max file size (MB, optional) input shown for file upload type
test_results.test4_signup_email_password_locked: FAIL - Existing saved schema shows Full Name as first field. Backend _SIGNUP_FORM_SCHEMA doesn't include email/password.
test_results.test5_partner_signup_tile_visible: PASS - Partner Sign-Up Page tile visible in Authentication tab for platform_super_admin
test_results.test6_portal_stats_toggle: PASS - Customer Portal slide shows 'Show stats on portal' toggle with aria-checked and description
test_results.test7_portal_stats_hidden: PASS - After fixing backend models.py (adding portal_show_stats field), portal-stats not rendered when toggle disabled
test_results.test8_file_upload_styled: PASS - Code verified: UniversalFormRenderer renders file as label wrapper + hidden input + 'Choose file' span, not raw text input

rca_of_issues.test7_portal_show_stats_bug: Root cause: portal_show_stats field missing from WebsiteSettingsUpdate Pydantic model in backend/models.py. FastAPI/Pydantic discards extra fields not in model. Frontend was sending {portal_show_stats: false} which was silently ignored. Fix: added portal_show_stats: Optional[bool] = None to WebsiteSettingsUpdate.
rca_of_issues.test4_signup_email_password: Root cause: Backend _SIGNUP_FORM_SCHEMA constant in website.py starts with full_name (not email/password). Frontend SIGNUP_DEFAULT_SCHEMA (in WebsiteAuthSection.tsx) has correct email/password at top but is only used when ws.signup_form_schema is falsy. Since backend always returns saved schema (from _SIGNUP_FORM_SCHEMA default), email/password never appear at top. Fix needed: update backend _SIGNUP_FORM_SCHEMA to start with email+password, update _migrate_signup_schema to inject them into existing schemas.
rca_of_issues.typescript_compile_error: Root cause: values prop type is Record<string, string|File|null>. val = values[key] resolved to string|File type. Used in string-only contexts (JSON.parse, input value prop). Fix: cast (values[key] as string).
